title: Thost Mod
description: This is a "just for fun" mod. The 1. Version literally serves just to make Thost which is Toast but in funy.
body:
# This mod serves no specific purpose, but to be silly
It is a funy project, made to be silly and nice. As of now, it thosts thost. Thost is toast but in funy. Is it balanced? ehhhhh.... Is it funy? Not jet. What does it do? Thosts thost, and has a fork, so children may learn what happens when one does combine a fork and a Thoster.
